title: 'podman run' with untagged image ends with 'panic: runtime error: index out of range'
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

[//]: # **kind bug**

**Description**
When calling `podman run IMAGE_ID` where `IMAGE_ID` points to an untagged image podman will run into `panic: runtime error: index out of range`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. build any image and don't tag it

2. `podman run IMAGE_ID`


**Describe the results you received:**
```
panic: runtime error: index out of range

goroutine 1 [running]:
main.createContainer(0xc420160580, 0xc420130000, 0xc420130000, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/create.go:126 +0x7fb
main.runCmd(0xc420160580, 0x0, 0x0)
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/run.go:49 +0xd4
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.HandleAction(0x10d4420, 0x131c690, 0xc420160580, 0x0, 0xc4203346c0)
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/app.go:501 +0xc8
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.Command.Run(0x1289eae, 0x3, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x12ae463, 0x20, 0x0, ...)
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/command.go:165 +0x47d
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli.(*App).Run(0xc4201e2a80, 0xc4200a8060, 0x3, 0x3, 0x0, 0x0)
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/urfave/cli/app.go:259 +0x6e8
main.main()
	/home/pkubat/Workdir/tmp/podman/libpod-e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/main.go:251 +0x175b
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
A container is started without any issues.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Once the built image gets tagged `podman run IMAGE_ID` works without any issues.

Using podman from latest master (https://github.com/containers/libpod/commit/e4770b82895659278b67a1bddb1a5acd8d785f59)

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.9.3-dev
Go Version:    go1.10.4
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
host:
  Conmon:
    package: podman-0.9.2.1-1.gite4770b8.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 1.12.0-dev, commit: 9b94add581d789ae0c0014e1ab57f1f7b62700ce-dirty'
  MemFree: 404865024
  MemTotal: 11980427264
  OCIRuntime:
    package: runc-1.0.0-51.dev.gitfdd8055.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.0'
  SwapFree: 5860749312
  SwapTotal: 6043987968
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 4
  hostname: localhost.localdomain
  kernel: 4.18.5-200.fc28.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 4h 55m 42.68s (Approximately 0.17 days)
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - registry.access.redhat.com
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 18
  GraphDriverName: vfs
  GraphOptions: []
  GraphRoot: /home/pkubat/.local/share/containers/storage
  GraphStatus: {}
  ImageStore:
    number: 65
  RunRoot: /run/user/21722/run


```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: How did you create this untagged image.  I just tried this on my box and it seems to have run correctly.
Is this rootless? This sounds like a rootless bug

>Is this rootless? This sounds like a rootless bug

Was hitting this on both root and rootless. But seems that #1501 has fixed my issue now:
```
$ sudo podman build -f Dockerfile.tt .
STEP 1: FROM fedora:28
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:565884f490d9ec697e519c57d55d09e268542ef2c1340fd63262751fa308f047
 82.90 MB / 82.90 MB [======================================================] 4s
Copying config sha256:c582c1438f27b3775e2534abc82d14974ecb00c2c53161d05ec73a73d35e1235
 2.29 KB / 2.29 KB [========================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2: RUN echo "Hello!"
Hello!
--> 9a1a9e10b1b9e8eca953ab5b9d2158dc4aa4c09e436828983da470d320011e69
STEP 3: COMMIT
$ sudo podman run --rm 9a1a9e10b1b9e8eca953ab5b9d2158dc4aa4c09e436828983da470d320011e69 bash -c "echo Hello!"
Hello!
```

Thanks! Closing
